mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT -1 AS PARENT_ADDRESS_BOOK_IDX, 0 AS ADDRESS_BOOK_IDX, '주소록' AS ADDRESS_BOOK_NAME FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT PARENT_ADDRESS_BOOK_IDX, ADDRESS_BOOK_IDX, ADDRESS_BOOK_NAME FROM CMS_ADDRESS_BOOK_GROUP WHERE homepage_id = #{memberInfo.homepage_id} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberInfo.member_id} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR ADDRESS_BOOK_IDX = PARENT_ADDRESS_BOOK_IDX START WITH ADDRESS_BOOK_IDX = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY ADDRESS_BOOK_NAME

SELECT address_book_idx, address_idx, address_name, address_cell_phone, address_email, add_date, modify_date, ilus_user_id, ilus_user_seq, ilus_web_id FROM CMS_ADDRESS_BOOK WHERE homepage_id = #{memberInfo.homepage_id} AND member_id = #{memberInfo.member_id} AND address_book_idx = #{address_book_idx} ORDER BY add_date DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(address_book_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_ADDRESS_BOOK_GROUP WHERE homepage_id = #{memberInfo.homepage_id} AND member_id = #{memberInfo.member_id}
INSERT INTO CMS_ADDRESS_BOOK_GROUP ( homepage_id, member_id, address_book_idx, group_idx, parent_address_book_idx, address_book_name, add_date, modify_date, ilus_user_id, ilus_user_seq, ilus_web_id ) VALUES ( #{memberInfo.homepage_id}, #{memberInfo.member_id}, #{address_book_idx}, #{group_idx}, #{parent_address_book_idx}, #{address_book_name}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, '', '', '' )

SELECT NVL(MAX(address_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_ADDRESS_BOOK WHERE address_book_idx = #{address_book_idx} AND member_id = #{memberInfo.member_id}
INSERT INTO CMS_ADDRESS_BOOK ( address_book_idx, address_idx, address_name, address_cell_phone, address_email, add_date, modify_date, ilus_user_id, ilus_user_seq, ilus_web_id, homepage_id, member_id ) VALUES ( #{address_book_idx}, #{address_idx}, #{address_name}, #{address_cell_phone}, #{address_email}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, '', '', '', #{memberInfo.homepage_id}, #{memberInfo.member_id} )
